mapper.select:
select it.issue_type_id, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name as initial_status_name, it.issue_type_name,
nvl(max( case when fs.field_code in ('i001', 'ASSIGNEE') and fs.use_yn = 'Y' then 'Y' end ), 'N') as assignee_yn,
nvl(max( case when fs.field_code in ('i002', 'MILESTONE') and fs.use_yn = 'Y' then 'Y' end ), 'N') as milestone_yn,
nvl(max( case when fs.field_code in ('i003', 'PARENT_ISSUE') and fs.use_yn = 'Y' then 'Y' end ), 'N') as parent_issue_yn,
nvl(max( case when fs.field_code in ('i004', 'START_DATE') and fs.use_yn = 'Y' then 'Y' end ), 'N') as start_date_yn,
nvl(max( case when fs.field_code in ('i005', 'DUE_DATE') and fs.use_yn = 'Y' then 'Y' end ), 'N') as due_date_yn,
nvl(max( case when fs.field_code in ('i006', 'ESTIMATED_HOURS') and fs.use_yn = 'Y' then 'Y' end ), 'N') as estimated_hours_yn
from issue_type it join issue_status ist on it.initial_status_id = ist.issue_status_id left join issue_type_field_setting fs on it.issue_type_id = fs.issue_type_id where it.user_id = #{userId} and ist.user_id = #{userId}
and it.issue_type_id in
#{issueTypeId}
group by it.issue_type_id, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name, it.issue_type_name, it.created_at
order by it.created_at desc, it.issue_type_id desc

select it.issue_type_id, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name as initial_status_name, it.issue_type_name, it.roadmap_yn, it.description, it.created_at, it.updated_at, it.user_id from issue_type it join issue_status ist on it.initial_status_id = ist.issue_status_id where it.issue_type_id = #{issueTypeId} and it.user_id = #{userId} and ist.user_id = #{userId}
select project_id, project_name from project where owner_id = #{userId} order by created_at desc, project_name

select itp.project_id from issue_type_project itp join issue_type it on itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id join project p on itp.project_id = p.project_id where itp.issue_type_id = #{issueTypeId} and it.user_id = #{userId} and p.owner_id = #{userId} order by itp.project_id

select case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 'ASSIGNEE' when 'i002' then 'MILESTONE' when 'i003' then 'PARENT_ISSUE' when 'i004' then 'START_DATE' when 'i005' then 'DUE_DATE' when 'i006' then 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' else fs.field_code end as field_code from issue_type_field_setting fs join issue_type it on fs.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id where fs.issue_type_id = #{issueTypeId} and it.user_id = #{userId} and fs.use_yn = 'Y' order by case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 1 when 'i002' then 2 when 'i003' then 3 when 'i004' then 4 when 'i005' then 5 when 'i006' then 6 when 'ASSIGNEE' then 1 when 'MILESTONE' then 2 when 'PARENT_ISSUE' then 3 when 'START_DATE' then 4 when 'DUE_DATE' then 5 when 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' then 6 else 99 end

select case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 'ASSIGNEE' when 'i002' then 'MILESTONE' when 'i003' then 'PARENT_ISSUE' when 'i004' then 'START_DATE' when 'i005' then 'DUE_DATE' when 'i006' then 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' else fs.field_code end as field_code from issue_type_field_setting fs join issue_type it on fs.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id where fs.issue_type_id = #{issueTypeId} and it.user_id = #{userId} and fs.required_yn = 'Y' order by case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 1 when 'i002' then 2 when 'i003' then 3 when 'i004' then 4 when 'i005' then 5 when 'i006' then 6 when 'ASSIGNEE' then 1 when 'MILESTONE' then 2 when 'PARENT_ISSUE' then 3 when 'START_DATE' then 4 when 'DUE_DATE' then 5 when 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' then 6 else 99 end
mapper.insert:
select 'ISSUE_TYPE_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_' || lpad( nvl(max(to_number(substr(issue_type_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) from issue_type where substr(issue_type_id, 1, 16) = 'ISSUE_TYPE_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_'
insert into issue_type ( issue_type_id, initial_status_id, issue_type_name, roadmap_yn, description, created_at, updated_at, user_id ) values ( #{issueTypeId}, #{initialStatusId}, #{issueTypeName}, null, #{description}, sysdate, null, #{userId} )

select 'ISSUE_TYPE_PROJECT_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_' || lpad( nvl(max(to_number(substr(issue_type_project_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) from issue_type_project where substr(issue_type_project_id, 1, 24) = 'ISSUE_TYPE_PROJECT_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_'
insert into issue_type_project ( issue_type_project_id, issue_type_id, project_id, created_at ) values ( #{issueTypeProjectId}, #{issueTypeId}, #{projectId}, sysdate )

select 'FIELD_SETTING_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_' || lpad( nvl(max(to_number(substr(field_setting_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) from issue_type_field_setting where substr(field_setting_id, 1, 19) = 'FIELD_SETTING_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_'
insert into issue_type_field_setting ( field_setting_id, issue_type_id, field_code, use_yn, required_yn, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{fieldSettingId}, #{issueTypeId}, case #{fieldCode} when 'ASSIGNEE' then 'i001' when 'MILESTONE' then 'i002' when 'PARENT_ISSUE' then 'i003' when 'START_DATE' then 'i004' when 'DUE_DATE' then 'i005' when 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' then 'i006' else #{fieldCode} end, #{useYn}, #{requiredYn}, sysdate, null )
